data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of rescheduling a single instance, but the evidence provided does not confirm this capability. The linked use case mentions the ability to move one cleaning to Thursday for that week only, which implies some flexibility, but there is no concrete API evidence or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result of confirming the requirement is not met.
gaps: The ability to reschedule a single instance is not explicitly validated through API reads or persisted state checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to reschedule a single instance.
